description: Attribute-driven navigation item. Minimal JS — icon synced via data-icon, rest is declarative. Selection and interaction managed by parent sherpa-nav. Chevron rotation via CSS ::part(chevron).

attributes.name: data-icon-svg
attributes.description: Inline SVG markup string. Takes precedence over data-icon.

attributes.name: data-svg-icon
attributes.description: Key into window.__sherpaNavIcons registry; resolved to data-icon-svg.

attributes.name: data-badge
attributes.description: Badge text rendered via internal sherpa-tag

attributes.name: data-badge-status
attributes.description: Badge status (critical | info | success | warning | urgent | brand). Defaults to "success".
